Hero.title:
Travel in style
and comfort in Paris
Hero.subtitle: The ultimate luxury transport experience. Private chauffeurs, luxury car rentals, and boutique apartments.

Services.heading: Our Services
Services.airportDesc: Personalized greeting upon arrival. Punctuality and comfort guaranteed between Paris airports (CDG, Orly, Le Bourget) and your destination.
Services.hourlyDesc: Your private chauffeur at your disposal for the duration of your choice. Ideal for business meetings or shopping trips.
Services.eventsDesc: A prestigious service for your weddings, gala evenings, or VIP events. Make an elegant and remarkable entrance.
Services.toursDesc: Discover Paris and its surroundings in absolute comfort. Let us guide you to the most beautiful monuments.
Services.apartmentsDesc: An exclusive selection of apartments and penthouses in the heart of Paris for an unforgettable stay with concierge service.
Services.vehiclesForSaleDesc: Acquire the vehicle of your dreams. A selection of rigorously inspected luxury, sports, and classic cars.
Services.autoPartsDesc: Find genuine spare parts and premium accessories for your prestige vehicle.

VehiclesForSale.heading: Vehicles for Sale
VehiclesForSale.sportsCarDesc: The embodiment of track performance, homologated for the road.

AutoParts.heading: Auto Parts
AutoParts.partDesc: Set of 4 ultra-lightweight forged wheels, exclusive design for sports models.

Apartments.heading: Our Apartments
Apartments.item1Desc: A spectacular penthouse with a private terrace offering breathtaking views of the Iron Lady.
Apartments.item2Desc: Old-world charm meets modern comfort in one of Paris's most sought-after districts.
Apartments.item3Desc: Absolute elegance just steps away from the capital's finest boutiques.
Apartments.item4Desc: An artistic and refined space in the heart of the literary district.
Apartments.item5Desc: The pinnacle of luxury and discretion for the most discerning travelers.
Apartments.item6Desc: A modern cocoon nestled on the heights of the Montmartre hill.
Apartments.item7Desc: A spacious and bright apartment with an unmissable view of the Palais Garnier.
Apartments.item8Desc: One of the most beautiful views in Paris in a modern and sleek setting.
Apartments.item9Desc: Experience French history in a sumptuous setting facing the Louvre Museum.

Fleet.heading: Our Chauffeur Fleet
Fleet.sClassDesc: The epitome of luxury. Perfect for business trips and executive travel. Massaging seats, Wi-Fi, refreshments.
Fleet.vClassDesc: Ultimate comfort for groups. Designed for 7 passengers with a modular lounge-style cabin and premium finishes.

Rental.heading: Rental
Rental.sportsCarDesc: The timeless sports car icon. Perfect for a weekend getaway or simply for the thrill of driving. Combining power, agility, and elegance.

WhyUs.heading: Why Us
WhyUs.description: We go beyond mere transportation. We create a seamless and refined travel experience. Our fleet and chauffeurs are hand-picked for their professionalism.
WhyUs.punctualityDesc: Your chauffeur is always on location 15 minutes before the scheduled time.
WhyUs.discretionDesc: Premium service, respecting your privacy and specific requirements.
WhyUs.luxuryDesc: A recent fleet, meticulously maintained, for optimal comfort.
WhyUs.securityDesc: Professional chauffeurs trained in security and eco-driving techniques.

Testimonials.heading: Testimonials
Testimonials.review1Content: Flawless service. The chauffeur was highly courteous and the S-Class was pristine. My exclusive provider when I travel to Paris.
Testimonials.review2Content: We rented the Porsche 911 for the weekend. Very smooth booking and impeccable car. Perfect to drive to Normandy.
Testimonials.review3Content: The customer experience is exceptional from start to finish. The transfer from Orly was completely stress-free thanks to the immediate pick-up at baggage claim.

Booking.heading: Booking
Booking.subheading: Plan your next journey or rental
Booking.description: Book your private chauffeur or rental car today. Our team is available 24/7 to answer all your requests.
Booking.name: Full Name
Booking.successMsg: Your request has been sent successfully! We will contact you very soon.
